Base class for reading queries.

functions.name: garf_io.formatter.format_report_for_writing
documentation:
Applies formatting strategies to report.

Args:
    report: Report that needs to be formatted.
    formatting_strategies: Strategies to be applied to report.

Returns:
    New report with updated data.

functions.name: garf_io.formatter.format_extension
documentation:
Formats query path to required extension.

Args:
    path_object: Path to query.
    current_extension: Extension of the query.
    new_extension: Required extension

Returns:
   Path with an updated extension.

classes.name: garf_io.formatter.FormattingStrategy

methods.name: garf_io.formatter.FormattingStrategy.apply_transformations
documentation: Applies class transformation to report.

methods.name: garf_io.formatter.FormattingStrategy._cast_to_enum
documentation: Ensures that strings are always converted to Enums.
Interface for all formatting strategies applied to GarfReport.

classes.name: garf_io.formatter.ArrayHandling
documentation: Specifies acceptable options for ArrayHandlingStrategy.

classes.name: garf_io.formatter.ArrayHandlingStrategy

methods.name: garf_io.formatter.ArrayHandlingStrategy.__init__
documentation:
Initializes strategy based on type_ and delimiter.

Args:
    type_: Type of array handling (ARRAYS, STRINGS).
    delimiter: Symbol used as delimiter when type_ is STRINGS.

methods.name: garf_io.formatter.ArrayHandlingStrategy.apply_transformations
documentation: Replaces arrays in the report.

methods.name: garf_io.formatter.ArrayHandlingStrategy._format_rows
documentation:
Formats rows of report based on join_strategy.

Args:
    rows: Rows on garf_report.GarfReport.
    nested_field_handler: Handlers to nested structures.

Returns:
    Formatted rows.

methods.name: garf_io.formatter.ArrayHandlingStrategy._delimiter_join
documentation:
Helper function to perform join by an instance delimiter.

Args:
    field: A nested field.

Returns:
    The same field but concatenated to string.

Handles arrays in the report.

Arrays can be left as-is or converted to strings with required delimiter.

Attributes:
    type_: Type of array handling (ARRAYS, STRINGS).
    delimiter: Symbol used as delimiter when type_ is STRINGS.

functions.name: garf_io.writer.create_writer
documentation:
Factory function for creating concrete writer.

Writer is created based on `writer_option` and possible `kwargs` needed
to correctly instantiate it.

Args:
    writer_option: Type of writer.
    kwargs: Any possible arguments needed o instantiate writer.

Returns:
    Concrete instantiated writer.

classes.name: garf_io.writers.json_writer.JsonWriter

methods.name: garf_io.writers.json_writer.JsonWriter.__init__
documentation:
Initializes JsonWriter based on a destination_folder.

Args:
  destination_folder: A local folder where JSON files are stored.
  kwargs: Optional keyword arguments to initialize writer.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.json_writer.JsonWriter.write
documentation:
Writes Garf report to a JSON file.

Args:
  report: Garf report.
  destination: Base file name report should be written to.

Returns:
  Base filename where data are written.

Writes Garf Report to JSON.

Attributes:
    destination_folder: Destination where JSON files are stored.

classes.name: garf_io.writers.csv_writer.CsvWriter

methods.name: garf_io.writers.csv_writer.CsvWriter.__init__
documentation:
Initializes CsvWriter based on a destination_folder.

Args:
  destination_folder: Destination where CSV files are stored.
  delimiter: CSV delimiter.
  quotechar: CSV writer quotechar.
  quoting: CSV writer quoting.
  kwargs: Optional keyword arguments to initialize writer.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.csv_writer.CsvWriter.write
documentation:
Writes Garf report to a CSV file.

Args:
    report: Garf report.
    destination: Base file name report should be written to.

Returns:
    Full path where data are written.

Writes Garf Report to CSV.

Attributes:
    destination_folder: Destination where CSV files are stored.
    delimiter: CSV delimiter.
    quotechar: CSV writer quotechar.
    quoting: CSV writer quoting.

classes.name: garf_io.writers.console_writer.ConsoleWriter

methods.name: garf_io.writers.console_writer.ConsoleWriter.__init__
documentation:
Initializes ConsoleWriter.

Args:
    page_size: How many row of report should be written
    format: Type of output ('table', 'json').
    kwargs: Optional parameter to initialize writer.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.console_writer.ConsoleWriter.write
documentation:
Writes Garf report to standard output.

Args:
  report: Garf report.
  destination: Base file name report should be written to.

Writes reports to standard output.

Attributes:
  page_size: How many row of report should be written
  type: Type of output ('table', 'json').

functions.name: garf_io.writers.bigquery_writer._define_schema
documentation:
Infers schema from GarfReport.

Args:
  report: GarfReport to infer schema from.

Returns:
  Schema fields for a given report.

functions.name: garf_io.writers.bigquery_writer._get_result_types
documentation:
Maps each column of report to BigQuery field type and repeated status.

Fields types are inferred based on report results or results placeholder.

Args:
  report: GarfReport to infer field types from.

Returns:
  Mapping between each column of report and its field type.

functions.name: garf_io.writers.bigquery_writer._get_bq_schema
documentation:
Converts report fields types to BigQuery schema fields.

Args:
  types: Mapping between column names and its field type.

Returns:
   BigQuery schema fields corresponding to GarfReport.

classes.name: garf_io.writers.bigquery_writer.BigQueryWriter

methods.name: garf_io.writers.bigquery_writer.BigQueryWriter.__init__
documentation:
Initializes BigQueryWriter.

Args:
  project: Id of Google Cloud Project.
  dataset: BigQuery dataset to write data to.
  location: Location of a newly created dataset.
  write_disposition: Option for overwriting data.
  kwargs: Optional keywords arguments.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.bigquery_writer.BigQueryWriter.client
documentation: Instantiated BigQuery client.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.bigquery_writer.BigQueryWriter.create_or_get_dataset
documentation: Gets existing dataset or create a new one.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.bigquery_writer.BigQueryWriter.write
documentation:
Writes Garf report to a BigQuery table.

Args:
  report: Garf report.
  destination: Name of the table report should be written to.

Returns:
  Name of the table in `dataset.table` format.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.bigquery_writer.BigQueryWriter._create_or_get_table
documentation:
Gets existing table or create a new one.

Args:
  table_name: Name of the table in BigQuery.
  schema: Schema of the table if one should be created.

Returns:
  BigQuery table object.

Writes Garf Report to BigQuery.

Attributes:
  project: Id of Google Cloud Project.
  dataset: BigQuery dataset to write data to.
  location: Location of a newly created dataset.
  write_disposition: Option for overwriting data.

classes.name: garf_io.writers.sqldb_writer.SqlAlchemyWriter

methods.name: garf_io.writers.sqldb_writer.SqlAlchemyWriter.__init__
documentation:
Initializes SqlAlchemyWriter based on connection_string.

Args:
    connection_string: Connection string to database.
if_exists: Behaviour when data already exists in the table.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.sqldb_writer.SqlAlchemyWriter.write
documentation:
Writes Garf report to the table.

Args:
    report: GarfReport to be written.
    destination: Name of the output table.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.sqldb_writer.SqlAlchemyWriter.engine
documentation: Creates engine based on connection string.

Handles writing GarfReports data to databases supported by SqlAlchemy.

Attributes:
    connection_string:
        Connection string to database.
        More at https://docs.sqlalchemy.org/en/20/core/engines.html.
    if_exists:
        Behaviour when data already exists in the table.

methods.name: garf_io.writers.sheets_writer.SheetWriter.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the SheetWriter to write reports to Google Sheets.

Args:
    share_with: Email address to share the spreadsheet.
    credentials_file: Path to the service account credentials file.
    spreadsheet_url: URL of the Google Sheets spreadsheet.
    is_append: Whether you want to append data to the spreadsheet.
Responsible for writing reports to Google Sheets.
